description: Kill-list verification results cross-referenced against historical_bugs.json. entries.reason: tiny-Llama CPU L0 suite cannot reach the Qwen3-MoE batched-decode path; reproducing needs a tiny Qwen3-MoE fixture (deferred). Repro patch regenerated against migrated source and verified to apply.
not reproducible at tiny CPU scale — the LlmExecutor never drives the batched paged-decode scratch path the bug lives in.
